subject: SAP CAP (Node.js stack)
note: Source of truth for the course outline. scaffold-course.mjs and validate-course.mjs read this. Each lesson currently has a single 'overview' theory stage (skeleton); hands-on edu stages are added per lesson during population.

typescript_prologue.title: TypeScript Setup and Tooling
typescript_prologue.summary: Establish the TypeScript toolchain before mirroring the JavaScript curriculum: cds add typescript, @cap-js/cds-types, cds-typer and the @cds-models folder, and cds watch running TS via tsx.

phases.milestone: A runnable AssetCare service on a local database with a real domain model.

lessons.title: Hello CAP
lessons.summary: Scaffold a CAP project, model one entity, and get a zero-code OData V4 service from the model alone.

lessons.title: Local PostgreSQL persistence
lessons.summary: Move AssetCare onto a local PostgreSQL database, generate DDL, deploy, and seed data from CSV.

lessons.title: Reuse aspects, common types and CodeLists
lessons.summary: Refactor master data onto cuid/managed, currencies, and a translatable status CodeList.

lessons.title: Associations and compositions
lessons.summary: Model the relational graph and document structure: equipment to manufacturer/location, work order with contained items and inspections.

lessons.title: Projections, calculated and virtual elements
lessons.summary: Expose lean read models and add model-computed fields.
cap_features: service projections (as projection on / as select from)

lessons.title: Querying with CQL and cds.ql
lessons.summary: Write programmatic queries and a transactional deep-insert with the query API.

phases.milestone: Domain rules, validation and custom operations layered on the generic providers.

lessons.title: Custom business logic: event handlers
lessons.summary: Add domain rules with before/on/after handlers and the request context.

lessons.title: Input validation and declarative constraints
lessons.summary: Enforce valid work orders declaratively with friendly, localizable errors.

lessons.title: Custom actions and functions
lessons.summary: Add RPC-style operations beyond CRUD, bound and unbound.

phases.milestone: A secured app with a Fiori draft editing experience and localization.

lessons.title: Authentication and authorization
lessons.summary: Add role-based and instance-based access control, tested with mock users.

lessons.title: Fiori drafts
lessons.summary: Make work orders draft-enabled: create, save-as-draft, activate, with draft handlers.

lessons.title: Serving Fiori elements UIs
lessons.summary: Generate a list and object page from CDS UI annotations, with value helps.
cap_features: Fiori UI annotations (LineItem, SelectionFields, HeaderInfo, Facets, FieldGroup)

lessons.title: Localization and i18n
lessons.summary: Translate data, labels, CodeLists and messages for a multilingual UI.

phases.milestone: Media, search, hierarchies, time-effective data and analytics over the model.

lessons.title: Media and attachments
lessons.summary: Stream inspection photos and a generated report; add @cap-js/attachments.

lessons.title: Full-text and fuzzy search
lessons.summary: Enable $search across master data with controlled scope and ranking.

lessons.title: Recursive hierarchies
lessons.summary: Model functional locations as a tree and render a Fiori TreeTable.
cap_features: Fiori TreeTable / sibling order and move

lessons.title: Temporal data
lessons.summary: Model dated warranty terms and query 'under warranty as of date' via time travel.

lessons.title: Analytics: maintenance KPIs
lessons.summary: Compute KPIs with grouping, aggregation over associations and window functions.

phases.milestone: An event-driven AssetCare integrated with an external (mocked) ERP and multiple protocols.

lessons.title: Background jobs and scheduling
lessons.summary: Auto-generate due work orders from maintenance plans with a recurring detached job.

lessons.title: Messaging and events
lessons.summary: Emit WorkOrderCompleted reliably via the outbox; subscribe and react.
cap_features: brokers (file-based, Event Mesh, Event Hub, Redis)

lessons.title: Remote services
lessons.summary: Import a mock ERP API and consume it to refresh equipment master; mock it locally.

lessons.title: Protocols and API surface
lessons.summary: Expose the service over OData, REST and GraphQL; publish OpenAPI; export a client.

lessons.title: Error handling and messages
lessons.summary: Return clear, localized, collected errors from the maintenance workflows.

phases.milestone: A typed, tested, audited and privacy-aware AssetCare.

lessons.title: TypeScript and typed development
lessons.summary: Type the handlers with generated model types and run under tsx (JSDoc equivalent in the JS track).

lessons.title: Testing CAP applications
lessons.summary: Write unit and integration tests with cds.test; run them with Vitest.
cap_features: integration tests with profiles and resolved bindings

lessons.title: Change tracking and audit history
lessons.summary: Record a human-readable change history on critical records and show it in the UI.

lessons.title: Data privacy: technician personal data
lessons.summary: Classify personal data, enable audit logging, and expose a PDM endpoint.

phases.milestone: A multitenant, extensible, deployable AssetCare SaaS.

lessons.title: Feature toggles and per-tenant features
lessons.summary: Gate an optional predictive-maintenance feature per tenant/user.

lessons.title: Multitenancy
lessons.summary: Turn AssetCare into a SaaS with tenant isolation and onboarding, tested locally.

lessons.title: Extensibility
lessons.summary: Let a tenant add custom equipment fields and UI without forking the base app.

lessons.title: Productive deployment to SAP BTP
lessons.summary: Package for production (CF or Kyma), bind services, and plan a safe schema migration.
cap_features: cds build and cds up (CF default / Kyma)
